notes: second occurrence of an error, but agent states a clearly new hypothesis and the user is patient

messages.content: getting 'ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:6379' when I start the app
That's the app failing to reach Redis. Your docker-compose has Redis defined but the app runs outside Docker, so localhost:6379 has nothing listening. I've started the Redis container. Try again.

The container is up, so this is a different cause than before: your `.env` sets `REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379`, which is the Docker-internal hostname. Running outside Docker it should be `redis://localhost:6379`. I've updated it — restart the app.
ah that makes sense, the redis vs localhost thing. restarting now
